## Issue Details
### Describe the feature you'd like to see added to EValuator.
A clear and concise description of your proposed feature.

### Would your feature request affect any current functionality?
A clear and concise description of any conflicts/inconsistencies that your proposed feature would produce with existing EValuator functionality.

### Is your feature request related to an issue?
A clear and concise description of what the issue is (e.g. I'm always frustrated when [...]).

### Additional context
Add any other context or screenshots about the feature request here.
